Chapter 01 — Background

THE MAN
BEHIND THE CODE

Mohamed Elfarsisi · Egypt 🇪🇬

I'm a results-driven Computer Science undergraduate (Expected 2028) at Tanta University, Egypt — with frontend leadership experience and a track record of delivering real-world international impact.

As a Microsoft Learn Student Ambassador, I lead Azure Cloud and AI workshops reaching 100+ students. My joint internship at Microsoft × MCIT × CARE Egypt sharpened my skills in cloud-based digital transformation and enterprise communication.

My NASA Space Apps project reached the Top 1% globally. From a small town in Egypt to the top of a NASA international challenge.

Frontend Lead Cloud & Azure Industrial AI Agile / Scrum Digital Twin Open to Relocation
